command: echo '=== Check permissions ===' && ls -la '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Experts/PropFirmBot/' && echo '=== Test write ===' && touch '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Experts/PropFirmBot/test_write.tmp' && echo 'Write OK' && rm '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Experts/PropFirmBot/test_write.tmp' && echo '=== Find recent files ===' && find '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5' -name '*.ex5' -mmin -10 -ls 2>/dev/null && find '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5' -name 'PropFirmBot*' -ls 2>/dev/null && echo '=== Try compile WITHOUT staging ===' && export DISPLAY=:99 WINEPREFIX=/root/.wine WINEDEBUG=-all && unset STAGING_WRITECOPY && timeout 60 wine '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MetaEditor64.exe' /compile:'/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Experts/PropFirmBot/PropFirmBot.mq5' /log 2>&1; echo "Exit: $?" && echo '=== Check ex5 again ===' && find '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Experts/PropFirmBot' -ls 2>/dev/null && echo '=== Check wineprefix overlay ===' && find /root/.wine -name 'PropFirmBot.ex5' -ls 2>/dev/null && echo '=== Check /tmp ===' && find /tmp -name '*.ex5' -ls 2>/dev/null
